new_classes.definition_en: Water and water-derived products not falling under natural mineral water or aerated water, including ice, snow, water vapour, and natural water that has been filtered, sterilised, purified or softened, classified under CN subheading 2201 90 (Chapter 22). Corresponds to HS Explanatory Note to heading 2201, paragraphs (A) and (D).
Gaseous form of water (steam) classified under CN subheading 2201 90 00 (Chapter 22); a sub-type of OtherWater.

Natural water that has been subjected to one or more treatment processes (filtration, sterilisation, purification, or softening) but is not mineral water or aerated water, classified under CN subheading 2201 90 00 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The axioms cover the main product categories described in the legal text: (1) OtherWater as the residual subheading class under Water/2201 90, (2) WaterVapour as a named sub-type explicitly listed in the note, and (3) TreatedNaturalWater covering filtered, sterilised, purified and softened natural water. Disjointness with MineralWater and AeratedWater is expressed via complement restrictions. Coverage is not 1.0 because: (a) the HS Explanatory Note paragraphs (A) and (D) are referenced but their full content (e.g. ice, snow, and other specific products from paragraph A/D) is not exhaustively modelled as named sub-classes; (b) the hasTreatmentProcess property references a WaterTreatmentProcess class that is introduced as a range but not yet fully axiomatised in this session; (c) no explicit treatment-type value restrictions (filtration, sterilisation, etc.) are formalised as individuals or quality classes.
